calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Debby Ehrlich for petitioner Angela Rosas (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court noted there were no appearances made in opposition. The Court granted the petition and fixed bond in the amount of $801,000. Order signed in open court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
